flash.description: Our Sunny Days
• Solid black

flash.title: Aki
flash.description: Aki from Chainsaw Man, captured in loose red linework. Casual intimacy, sharp expression, and quiet menace.

flash.title: War
flash.description: War from Chainsaw Man, rendered in clean red linework. Calm, unsettling expression with controlled, intimate framing.

flash.title: Ness
flash.description: Ness from EarthBound unleashing psychic energy. Bold color, dynamic motion, and classic RPG pop-culture energy.

flash.title: Galactic Relics
flash.description: Star Wars flash featuring Admiral Ackbar, the Death Star, and iconic sci-fi weapons reimagined with floral and skeletal elements.

flash.title: Hive Mother
flash.description: Symmetrical horned skull with moth, florals, and honeycomb geometry. Nature, death, and ritual balance in bold ornamental linework.

flash.title: Power (Chainsaw Man)
flash.description: Power from Chainsaw Man captured mid-lunge with exaggerated forced perspective. Aggressive expression and raw manga linework.

flash.title: Deadly Devotion
flash.description: Two symbolic designs exploring love, danger, and commitment. Bold color, classic composition, and strong contrast.

flash.title: Quiet Poison
flash.description: Refined symbolic objects wrapped in flowing leaves. Blackwork with muted gold accents, balancing elegance and danger.

flash.title: Dickbutt
flash.description: Bold, playful character with strong linework and attitude. Simple, readable, and built to age well.

flash.title: Signal Lost
flash.description: Anime-inspired figure with a television head and glitching city backdrop. Themes of identity, noise, and disconnection.

flash.title: Makima (Bang)
flash.description: Makima from Chainsaw Man in her iconic “bang” pose. Controlled menace, intense eye contact, and sharp red linework.

flash.title: Anime Faces
flash.description: Anime character portraits featuring Zoro, Mahito, Zero Two, and Hiro. Expressive faces, bold color, and clean anime style.

flash.title: Anime Power Surge
flash.description: Anime character portraits featuring Daki, Sung Jin-Woo, Killua, and Gon. High-energy powers, bold color, and dynamic motion.

flash.title: Motoko Kusanagi
flash.description: Motoko Kusanagi from Ghost in the Shell with cyberpunk tech and ramen motifs. Cool confidence, color, and futuristic energy.

flash.title: Neon Hex Grenades
flash.description: Graffiti-tagged sci-fi grenades with glowing cores and neon glyphs. Loud color, chaotic energy, and video-game bomb flair.

flash.title: Leatherface
flash.description: Leatherface from The Texas Chainsaw Massacre, rendered in dense black linework. Chaotic texture and raw slasher energy.

flash.title: Pumpkin Pals
flash.description: Two trick-or-treaters stroll hand in hand, pumpkin buckets for heads. Sweet, eerie, and quietly unsettling Halloween energy.

flash.title: Audrey Hepburn (Fallen Icon)
flash.description: Audrey Hepburn reimagined with surreal devil symbolism. Classic beauty contrasted with dark graphic elements.

flash.title: Creepy Curios Flash Sheet
flash.description: A spooky flash sheet of eerie curios: fanged bites, eyeballs, blades, and ghostly treats. Perfect for small, creepy statement tattoos.

flash.title: Red Wake
flash.description: Elongated skull with glowing red eye and exposed jaw. Predator-like menace, sharp anatomy, and dark fantasy energy.

flash.title: Icons of Slasher Horror
flash.description: Four iconic horror villains rendered in detailed black and grey. A tribute sheet celebrating the most infamous slasher legends.

flash.title: 1UP Dreamer
flash.description: Playful portrait surrounded by classic gaming icons and power-ups. Nostalgia, joy, and pop-culture celebration in clean linework.

flash.title: Count Orlok
flash.description: Count Orlok from Nosferatu rendered in red linework with crawling rats. Plague imagery, dread, and silent horror.

flash.title: Derek Turnbow
flash.description: Derek Turnbow from Stranger Things in a stylized pose with retro game-inspired text. 80s attitude and pop-culture edge.

flash.title: Cursed Trio
flash.description: A red-line flash composition featuring Jujutsu Kaisen’s cursed power trio, capturing speed, rage, and supernatural intensity.

flash.title: Red Riot
flash.description: Eijiro Kirishima in his Red Riot form, bursting with raw energy and grit. A bold anime flash built for power and motion.

flash.title: Evangelion Unit-01 (Berserk)
flash.description: Evangelion Unit-01 in berserk form, framed with cherry blossoms and swirling energy. Violent power and iconic anime contrast.

flash.title: Crown of Thorns
flash.description: Single eye framed by a crown of thorns, shedding a tear. Pain, faith, and endurance captured in stark blackwork.

flash.title: Burning Old Fashioned
flash.description: Classic old fashioned cocktail with a flaming twist. Heat, indulgence, and sharp color contrast in a clean graphic style.

flash.title: Naruto & Kurama
flash.description: Naruto Uzumaki merged with Kurama’s chakra. Intense focus, flowing fox energy, and clean anime linework.

flash.title: Horror Icons
flash.description: Classic horror portraits featuring Jason Voorhees, Hannibal Lecter, and Jack Torrance. Clean realism, sharp symbolism, and cult status.

flash.title: Hollow Ichigo
flash.description: Ichigo Kurosaki’s Hollow form, split between control and chaos. High-contrast blackwork flash with sharp energy and menace.

flash.title: Death to Klendathu
flash.description: Starship Troopers–inspired scene of a Mobile Infantry soldier battling an Arachnid. Satirical sci-fi violence and propaganda energy.

flash.title: Ryuko Matoi
flash.description: Kill la kill

flash.title: Himiko Toga
flash.description: Himiko Toga from My Hero Academia holding a bloodied knife. Playful menace, bright color, and chaotic villain energy.

flash.title: Maka & Soul
flash.description: Maka Albarn and Soul Evans from Soul Eater in a dynamic scythe attack, backed by the iconic grinning sun.

flash.title: Katsuki Bakugo
flash.description: Katsuki Bakugo from My Hero Academia launching forward with explosive force. High-impact action and bold anime linework.

flash.title: Memento Scarab
flash.description: A symmetrical scarab fused with a skull and sacred geometry, rendered in clean black linework with ritual and memento mori themes.

flash.title: Rootbound
flash.description: Female figure entwined with branches and leaves. Growth, vulnerability, and nature reclaiming the body in clean linework.

flash.title: Red Wake
flash.description: Elongated skull with glowing red eye and exposed jaw. Predator-like menace, sharp anatomy, and dark fantasy energy.

flash.title: Skyshard Raptor
flash.description: Stylized bird of prey with a glowing eye and crystalline crest. Focused aggression, clean color blocks, and mythic energy.

flash.title: Wrapped Witness
flash.description: A one-eyed, bandaged creature with exposed teeth and a trailing tongue—an ancient watcher trapped between hunger and decay.

flash.title: Cycle of Hunger
flash.description: Bird skull entwined with a serpent, framed by flowing color and smoke. Predation, balance, and endless consumption.

flash.title: Great White
flash.description: Clean linework great white shark in motion. Sharp silhouette, natural power, and classic tattoo readability.

flash.title: Dressed Like a Deadman
flash.description: Skeleton in a suit framed by banners reading “Dressed like a Deadman.” Mortality, status, and sharp blackwork symbolism.

flash.title: Ashes of Time
flash.description: A skull suspended between clockwork and compass, framed by flame—symbolizing mortality, time, and the illusion of control.

flash.title: Overcharged Core
flash.description: Crackling energy cell bursting with unstable power. Sci-fi tech, neon electricity, and high-voltage impact.

flash.title: Yuji Itadori (I’m You)
flash.description: Yuji Itadori from Jujutsu Kaisen with the iconic “I’m you.” line. Raw emotion, manga linework, and cursed energy.

flash.title: Vulpine Flow
flash.description: Stylized fox head with bold orange tones and flowing black shapes. Calm focus, movement, and modern tattoo composition.

flash.title: Harvest Offering
flash.description: Hands bound in blue ribbon present a bleeding fruit, framed by growth, ornament, and balance. Sacrifice, abundance, and ritual.

flash.title: Bloodline Tiger
flash.description: Snarling tiger head with bold color and a red crystal accent. Power, instinct, and ferocity in classic tattoo form.

flash.title: Bound Witness
flash.description: Red and black bird bound with glowing thread before a crown of thorns. Sacrifice, vigilance, and restrained power.

flash.title: Queen of Smoke
flash.description: Elegant female portrait with a floating crown and cigarette. Calm authority, modern royalty, and clean illustrative linework.

flash.title: Crystal Scarab
flash.description: A symmetrical beetle fused with sharp crystal forms. Clean linework with a mystical, ceremonial feel that works beautifully as a centered pi

flash.title: Jason Voorhees
flash.description: Jason Voorhees from Friday the 13th, rendered in gritty black linework. Classic slasher horror with raw intensity.

flash.title: Michael Myers
flash.description: Michael Myers from Halloween, rendered in raw black linework. Empty stare, heavy texture, and classic slasher horror presence.

flash.title: Medusa
flash.description: Medusa rendered within a fractured crystal form. Mythic seduction, danger, and punishment captured in stark black linework.

flash.title: Static Parade
flash.description: Anime-inspired schoolgirl with a television head, rendered in clean black linework. Media overload, identity loss, and noise.

flash.title: Mutual Threat
flash.description: Two opposing hands share a switchblade. Trust, tension, and the moment before violence in stark, minimal linework.

flash.title: Gravebound Hunt
flash.description: Armored warrior and wolf descend through shattered stone. Loyalty, survival, and violence captured in dense fantasy linework.

flash.title: Cut From the Same Cloth
flash.description: Ornamental composition of skulls, hands, and flowing forms. Themes of creation, destruction, and transformation in bold linework.

flash.title: Power Breach
flash.description: Armored figure struck by internal energy rupture. Sci-fi mortality, overload, and the cost of power rendered in vivid color.

flash.title: Predator (Yautja)
flash.description: The Predator (Yautja) in an aggressive pose with extended claws. Iconic sci-fi hunter energy in sharp linework.

flash.title: Dracula (The Count)
flash.description: Count Dracula inspired by Christopher Lee’s iconic Hammer Horror portrayal. Cold stare, gothic energy, and graphic accents.

flash.title: Jason Voorhees
flash.description: Iconic hockey mask portrait inspired by Friday the 13th. Silent menace, fear, and slasher horror in stark linework.

flash.title: Ink Bloom Thighs
flash.description: Abstract blackwork flowing along the thighs. Organic splatter, sharp movement, and body-driven symmetry.

flash.title: Cathedral Nocturne
flash.description: Gothic figure framed by cathedral spires and a broken moon. Sacred architecture meets nocturnal beauty and quiet menace.

flash.title: Rattlebone Serpent
flash.description: A skeletal serpent coils downward, all teeth and ribs. A study in motion, tension, and negative space.

flash.title: Lion Head
flash.description: Black work realistic animal head.
